top_signals.title: New Taiwan-Japan ferry service debuts on ship that has war evacuation role
top_signals.summary: The Yaima Maru is among vessels to be used to evacuate residents on southern Japanese islands to mainland Japan in times of crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jefferies Sued by Fund Investors Alleging Water Firm Fraud
top_signals.summary: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. has been hit with an investor class action lawsuit over bond purchases made by its 352 Capital fund in a water vending machine firm that federal prosecutors have called a scam.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oil Tankers Suffer Drone Attacks Off Turkey’s Black Sea Coast - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Tankers Suffer Drone Attacks Off Turkey’s Black Sea Coast  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Consumer Spending Comes Under Pressure as Inflation Picks Up - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Consumer Spending Comes Under Pressure as Inflation Picks Up  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Music venues are in dire straits: V&A show asks how we can help
top_signals.summary: As the V&A opens its Lost Music Venues exhibition, James Balmont asks we can save the grassroots institutions under threat A trip to the V&A often conjures up images of great Renaissance sculptures, haute couture and centuries-old tapestries – but those patronising the Kensington institution this summer will find something very different.  In Lost Music [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sui blockchain experiences second ‘stall’ in five months
top_signals.summary: Sui said the blockchain is experiencing a "network stall," as block explorers show the protocol has not produced a block in nearly 2 hours.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
